## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss contract updates and strategies for multiple clients, focusing on revenue optimization and commitment terms.](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pushing for 12-month commitments with clients to ensure longer-term engagements and stable revenue](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Implementing strategic pricing and discounting to showcase value and encourage larger commitments](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Addressing challenges with specific clients (Hey Jen, Arena, Homebase) regarding contract terms and payments](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Emphasis on expanding services and building relationships with key clients like Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

## Topics

### Contract Restructuring for Hey Jen

  - [Moving from 3-month to 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Updating pricing: Content Refresh ($8k), Programmatic ($7k), Link Building ($6k)](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Total monthly value shown as $21k, demonstrating discount from $22k](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [New effective date set for December 9th for a clean transition](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Removed pilot period from the contract](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Arena Outbound Strategy

  - [Planning to pitch outbound services](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Aiming for a 4-month engagement with a 90-day pilot](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Targeting 60-65% open rates as a success metric](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Emphasis on securing a 12-month contract for any new services](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

### Homebase Payment Issues

  - [Ongoing negotiations for different scope](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Marcel pushing for payment for work already completed (1 month)](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Stressing the importance of cash flow for the business](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Client Relationship Management

  - [Focus on building stronger relationships, particularly with Josh from Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Strategy to expand scope with Webflow by demonstrating content success](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Potential to increase engagement to $39k with Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Pricing and Contract Strategy

  - [Implementing bulk discounts for multiple work streams](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Showing higher initial prices with strikethroughs to emphasize value](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Pushing for longer commitments (12 months) across all clients](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Avoiding smaller deals ($6k-$18k) due to time investment vs. revenue](https://fathom.video/share/h5gLuZ3SqMGZwntNxzUfrv_LWwBY532m?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
